goal: Daily-subagent dispatch hook. 'gad start' (or an explicit 'gad start --dispatch-subagents') reads each project config for daily-subagent: true and, if today's run has not yet been recorded in .planning/subagent-runs/<projectid>/, spawns the configured subagent runtime with the project snapshot + task context. Writes run record on completion (consumes subagent-run-history todo schema).
